summary: Tested iteration 5 fixes: Profile.jsx compilation fix, ProfileChecklist component, Wallet Razorpay scroll fix, AI crew suggestions with Gemini fallback, and checklist API endpoint.

minor.issue: Checklist photo item checks `avatar_url` but profile photo is stored as `profile_image` (uploads.py line 108 saves to `profile_image`). Fix: change `user.get('avatar_url')` to `user.get('profile_image') or user.get('avatar_url')` in users.py line 224.

action_items: Fix checklist photo field mismatch in /app/backend/routers/users.py line 224: change `user.get('avatar_url')` to `user.get('profile_image') or user.get('avatar_url')`
critical_code_review_comments: Field mismatch: _build_checklist() uses `avatar_url` (line 224) but uploads.py saves profile picture to `profile_image` field. Even after uploading a photo, the checklist will show 'Add a profile photo' as not done.
No /profile route exists in App.js - only /profile/:id. The nav sidebar must link to /profile/{user.id}. This is by design but should be documented.

success_rate.frontend: 100% - Profile loads, checklist shows 6/8 (75%), expand/collapse works, dismiss hides checklist and sets localStorage, edit profile dialog opens, wallet shows plans and balance

context_for_next_testing_agent: Profile is accessed via /profile/:id (not /profile). Rohan ID: usr-rohan-00000000-0000-0000-0000-000000000002. Login requires setting localStorage 'photoo_notification_dismissed' to bypass notification modal. All 4 fixes are verified working. Known minor bug: checklist photo item checks avatar_url but field is profile_image.
rca_of_issue: Checklist photo field mismatch: users.py _build_checklist() at line 224 checks `user.get('avatar_url')` but the upload route (uploads.py line 108) stores profile picture as `profile_image`. Fix: `bool(user.get('profile_image') or user.get('avatar_url'))`
